compounds.frequency: daily (for anhedonia microdoses); every other day or twice weekly (for ED)

benefits.description: Addresses anhedonia and inability to feel horny by directly acting on the mechanism

protocol_notes: References multiple established studies from Europe/Russia on micro-dosing for anhedonia. Recommends starting very small (100-250 mcg range). Notes that ED-level dosing (1.5mg or more) is for 60+ age group; younger users should use lower doses.
